analysis_commentary: entropy_bonus 0.003→0.008 collapsed. Probe 1 max=0.658 (already elevated at init), growing to 0.9995 by end; illegal_mass_sum=1.0 throughout. Three consecutive runs now collapsed at three different entropy values (0.003, 0.004, 0.008) — collapse is seed-driven, not parameter-driven. Grad norms stayed under 100 this run (peak 50), so grad_clip is not the driver either.
